sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60560" key="*kudwna=ton" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Κῠδων-ᾶτον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n60560.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drink made from quinces</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg005:139" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.139</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κ. τριπτόν</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drug compounded of quinces</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:7:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
